title: Better Snowball Fight
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/linngdu664/Better-Snowball-Fight3-mod/master/README/a.png)
--
This is a great mod for multiplayer games, adding a variety of snowballs, tools, equipment and weapons. You can spray each other with snowballs without harming each other, you can also compete with each other in PvP, and you can make snowmen to fight with snowmen or let snowmen attack other creatures!
